{"DateTime":{"value":"2024-11-29 00:21:05","source":"mediawiki-metadata","hidden":""},"ObjectName":{"value":"Silicon wafer researcher","source":"mediawiki-metadata"},"CommonsMetadataExtension":{"value":1.2,"source":"extension","hidden":""},"Categories":{"value":"Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory|PD US DOE|Flickr images reviewed by FlickreviewR 2|Silicon wafers|Flickr images missing SDC published in","source":"commons-categories","hidden":""},"Assessments":{"value":"","source":"commons-categories","hidden":""},"ImageDescription":{"value":"LAWRENCE LIVERMORE NATIONAL LABORATORY RESEARCHER WILL FABRICATE NEUTRAL INTERFACES ON THIS FINISHED SILICON WAFER, POLYMER DEVICES DESIGNED TO BYPASS DAMAGED NERVES AND NEUTRONS IN HUMANS.

THE DEVICES ARE BEING ENGINEERED TO RESTORE SIGHT, HEARING, AND SPEECH AND EVEN REANIMATE LIMBS. ONE SUCH DEVICES IS THE FIRST EVER FDA-APPROVED RETINAL PROSTHESIS.

For more information or additional images, please contact 202-586-5251.","source":"commons-desc-page"},"DateTimeOriginal":{"value":"2013-08-05 20:09:20","source":"commons-desc-page"},"Credit":{"value":"https://www.flickr.com/photos/departmentofenergy/10843067534/","source":"commons-desc-page"},"Artist":{"value":"U.S. Department of Energy","source":"commons-desc-page"},"LicenseShortName":{"value":"Public domain","source":"commons-desc-page","hidden":""},"UsageTerms":{"value":"Public domain","source":"commons-desc-page"},"AttributionRequired":{"value":"false","source":"commons-desc-page","hidden":""},"Copyrighted":{"value":"False","source":"commons-desc-page","hidden":""},"Restrictions":{"value":"","source":"commons-desc-page","hidden":""},"License":{"value":"pd","source":"commons-templates","hidden":""}}
